scenes.relation: Chou Guangfu is trying to control his wife's behavior.
scenes.outcome: He manages to move her away, but the conflict continues.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei explodes at her husband, calling him a spineless loser and physically twisting his arm in rage. She then abruptly shifts to a manipulative tone, promising to give him her husband's pension money to appease him.
scenes.intent: He Chunmei wants to express her total contempt for her husband. She then uses a bribe to end the immediate physical struggle.
scenes.conflict: She is physically attacking her husband in her fury.
scenes.relation: The relationship between the couple is highly toxic and violent.
scenes.outcome: She hands him a cake and walks away, temporarily pacifying the situation.

scenes.title: Dian Yan
scenes.action: Dian Yan enters her secret space, observing the empty black soil and the unplanted rose bushes. She notes that the seedlings are in good condition but are not growing. She also looks at her living area, which currently only has a desk and a chair.
scenes.intent: The hero wants to check the progress of her hidden dimension. She plans to expand her living area.
scenes.conflict: The plants are not growing despite being healthy.
scenes.outcome: She prepares for the next phase of development.

scenes.title: Dian Yan
scenes.action: Dian Yan contemplates the construction of a new three-story mobile hotel module costing 6,000 yuan per square meter, featuring luxury amenities like a pool and cinema. She plans to install solar panels on the roof tomorrow.
scenes.intent: The hero wants to upgrade her living conditions to a luxury level. She aims to move her daily life into this module.
scenes.conflict: The high cost of materials and the need for manual installation.
scenes.outcome: She establishes a clear goal for her upcoming tasks.

scenes.title: Dian Yan
scenes.action: After spending time in her secret space, Dian Yan returns to her real apartment. She sets her air conditioner to night mode and goes to sleep to recover from her month of traveling.
scenes.intent: The hero wants to rest and recover from exhaustion. She seeks a full night of sleep.
scenes.conflict: Physical exhaustion from recent travels.
scenes.outcome: She falls asleep, ending the day's events.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan returns to her apartment after spending time in space. She configures her air conditioner to night mode and prepares for sleep. She seeks a full rest after a month of traveling abroad.

location.name: Jiang Yan's apartment
location.description: a private living space equipped with an air conditioner.

scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and recover from her travels. She aims to stabilize her environment for sleep. She seeks physical rejuvenation.
scenes.conflict: The exhaustion from a month of international travel. The need for deep sleep after intense activity.
scenes.outcome: She successfully settles into her apartment and goes to sleep.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan wakes up at seven in the morning and checks the thermometer. She is shocked to see the temperature has reached 45 degrees. She checks weather forecasts for different countries and realizes the heat is a global phenomenon.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the daily weather. She seeks to understand the current temperature. She aims to monitor environmental changes.
scenes.conflict: The sudden and extreme rise in global temperature. The unexpected heatwave of 45 degrees.
scenes.outcome: She discovers a global heatwave is occurring.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan opens a popular social media application to read the news. She encounters posts with hundreds of thousands of likes and comments regarding various disasters. She reads about typhoons, earthquakes, and the emergence of giant mutant mosquitoes.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the public and governmental reaction to the heat. She seeks information on current global events. She aims to stay informed.
scenes.conflict: The overwhelming amount of catastrophic news. The sudden appearance of biological and geological threats.
scenes.outcome: She learns about the simultaneous occurrence of typhube, earthquakes, and mutant mosquitoes.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan reads specific details about giant blood-sucking mosquitoes near an abandoned nuclear power plant. She learns that these mutants have double jaws and can drain a human completely. She notes that even the poles are no longer safe.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the level of biological threat. She seeks to understand the capabilities of the mutants. She aims to identify safe zones.
scenes.conflict: The invasion of previously safe, frozen territories by mutants. The extreme lethality of the new species.
scenes.outcome: She realizes the scale of the biological catastrophe is global.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan reflects on her old social media post about the approaching Apocalypse. She realizes her post has become a trending topic, with people calling her a prophet. She remembers destroying her old SIM card while abroad.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the irony of her fame. She seeks to recall her previous actions regarding her identity. She aims to acknowledge her role in the current discourse.
scenes.conflict: The discrepancy between her current anonymity and her sudden fame. The destruction of her original digital identity.
props: Memories of a destroyed SIM card
scenes.outcome: She recognizes that her warnings are being validated by the current chaos.

scenes.title: Jiangly Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan analyzes the government's handling of the mosquito outbreak. She realizes that the government initially hid the information because the numbers were small. She observes that the sudden mass emergence suggests a deliberate activation.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to uncover the truth behind the news. She seeks to understand why the government is only speaking up now. She aims to identify the cause of the sudden surge.
scenes.conflict: The government's initial suppression of information. The suspicious timing of the mass outbreak.
scenes.outcome: She concludes that the situation is being manipulated or has reached a breaking point.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan investigates the biological traits of the mutant mosquitoes. She learns they are resistant to extreme temperatures and have an increased life cycle. She notes the presence of radioactive traces in their bodies linked to the abandoned power plant.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to understand the mutation's origin. She seeks to identify the link between radiation and evolution. She aims to comprehend the biological threat.
scenes.conflict: The scientific impossibility of such rapid evolution. The presence of radioactive contamination in the ecosystem.
scenes.outcome: She realizes the environmental disaster began long before the official announcements.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan reads about the extreme heat reaching 50-60 degrees in tropical regions. She sees news of people being advised to stockpile water and food. She observes the shift to remote learning and power grid strain.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the impact of the heat on civilization. She seeks to understand the societal response. She aims to monitor the stability of essential services.
scenes.conflict: The extreme temperature spikes. The potential collapse of the power grid and food supplies.
scenes.outcome: She understands that the global infrastructure is reaching its limit.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiangly Yan observes the chaos in Anmin, where the demand for air conditioner installers has skyrocketed. She sees images of emptied supermarkets and the rise of survivalist bloggers. She realizes the world is entering a state of total chaos.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to gauge the local impact in her city. She seeks to understand the level of public panic. She aims to observe the new social order.
scenes.conflict: The overwhelming demand for services. The breakdown of the supply chain and the rise of panic.
scenes.state: Realizing the gravity of the situation.
scenes.outcome: She recognizes that the apocalypse has arrived earlier than expected.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan concludes that she returned to the country at the perfect, yet most dangerous, time. She realizes the approaching typhoons mean she must complete all her plans immediately. She decides there is no turning back and must act before it becomes impossible to go outside.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to secure her survival. She seeks to finish her preparations before the weather worsens. She aims to execute her remaining plans before total lockdown.
scenes.conflict: The approaching typhoons and the imminent impossibility of leaving the house. The shrinking window of opportunity.
scenes.outcome: She commits to an urgent course of action to complete her plans.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan
scenes.action: Dzyan Yan reads news about approaching typhoons and realizes the apocalypse has arrived a month early. She decides she must complete all her plans immediately because leaving the house will soon become impossible. She feels a sense of extreme urgency and desperation.
scenes.intent: To finalize all preparations before the weather becomes impassable.
scenes.conflict: The approaching typhoons and the onset of the apocalypse threaten her ability to move.
scenes.outcome: She decides to act immediately.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan
scenes.action: Dzyan Yan calls her driver to arrange a pickup. The driver, who was considering canceling due to the news, agrees after she offers him triple pay. Dzyan Yan prepares her gear, including a protective suit, a helmet, and a portable fan.
scenes.intent: To secure transportation despite the dangerous conditions.
scenes.conflict: The driver's reluctance to leave his home due to the news.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: A protective suit, a helmet, and a small portable fan hanging from her neck.

scenes.relation: Dzyan Yan uses financial leverage to persuade the driver.
scenes.outcome: The driver agrees to the trip.

scenes.title: Dzyan and Guards
scenes.action: Dzyan Yan exits her apartment building and finds the courtyards and entrances partially blocked by security. Guards explain that these are temporary measures to prevent panic and looting during the food shortage. They enforce a rule that only one person per family may go shopping.
scenes.intent: To pass through the security checkpoint to reach her destination.
scenes.conflict: Security restrictions and the threat of social chaos/looting.
scenes.relation: Dzyan Yan interacts with the authorities.
scenes.outcome: She prepares to move toward the taxi.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan and Guards
scenes.action: The guards observe Dzyan Yan's heavy protective equipment with surprise. After checking her exit permit, they allow her to pass through the gates. She finds her taxi waiting for her.
scenes.intent: To exit the residential area.
scenes.conflict: The guards' scrutiny of her unusual gear.
scenes.state: Dzyan Yan is prepared; Guards are surprised.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Full protective gear including a suit and helmet.

scenes.outcome: Dzyan Yan successfully exits the gates.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan
scenes.action: Dzyan Yan rides in the taxi through a city that appears to be on pause. The streets are nearly empty of people and cars, while water trucks spray moisture to combat the intense heat. Emergency vehicles pass by, highlighting the ongoing crisis.
scenes.intent: To reach the rented warehouse.
scenes.conflict: Extreme heat and the desolate, high-tension atmosphere of the city.
scenes.outcome: She arrives at the warehouse.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan
scenes.action: Upon arriving at the warehouse, Dzyan Yan pays the driver and dismisses him. She decides to use her spatial storage to retrieve solar panels before the delivery truck arrives. She sets up a folding chair and sits down to wait.
scenes.intent: To prepare the site by retrieving solar panels from her spatial storage.
scenes.conflict: The pressure of time and the need to be ready for the arrival.
scenes.relation: Dzyan Yan concludes her transaction with the driver.
scenes.outcome: She is seated and ready for the delivery.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan, Lyu, and Crew
scenes.action: A truck arrives at the warehouse carrying a mobile capsule, a mounting crew, and the company owner, Mr. Lyu. Several cleaners in uniforms arrive with disinfection equipment. Lyu is present to personally oversee the 6-million-yuan project and meet Dzyan Yan.
scenes.intent: To deliver and install the mobile capsule.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and the logistical scale of the installation.
scenes.relation: Lyu seeks to establish a business relationship with Dzyan Yan.
scenes.outcome: The installation process begins.

scenes.title: Lyu and Assistant
scenes.action: Lyu is startled by Dzyan Yan's heavy protective gear. His assistant quickly takes charge by distributing electrolytic water to the workers and ordering the cleaners to spray mosquito repellent throughout the warehouse. Lyu motivates the workers by promising bonuses and fans.
scenes.intent: To manage the crew and ensure the work proceeds despite the heat.
scenes.conflict: The intense heat and the threat of mutated mosquitoes.
scenes.state: The assistant is proactive; the workers are motivated by rewards.
scenes.outcome: The workers begin working energetically.

scenes.title: Lyu and Dzyan Yan
scenes.action: Lyu approaches Dzyan Yan and offers her a chilled bottle of electrolytic water from his car fridge. He expresses concern that her protective suit will not prevent heatstroke. Dzyan Yan accepts the water and thanks him.
scenes.intent: Lyu wants to show care and professionalism; Dzyan Yan wants to stay hydrated.
scenes.conflict: The physical danger of heatstroke.
scenes.state: Lyu is attentive and observant; Dzyan Yan is polite but brief.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Protective suit and helmet; Lyu=Fashionable clothing.

scenes.relation: Lyu shows hospitality to a major client.
scenes.outcome: Dzyan Yan accepts the water.

scenes.title: Dzyan Yan and Lyu
scenes.action: Lyu questions the wisdom of installing the capsule in a warehouse, noting the lack of sunlight for the panels and the danger of mutated mosquitoes from the nearby weeds. Dzyan Yan gives a short, definitive "Yes" to his inquiry. Lyu accepts her decision and focuses on his job.
scenes.intent: Lyu seeks clarification; Dzyan Yan intends to stick to her plan.
scenes.conflict: The mismatch between the capsule's luxury design and the warehouse's harsh environment.
scenes.state: Lyu is skeptical but respectful; Dzyan Yan is resolute.
scenes.relation: Dzyan Yan asserts her authority as the client.
scenes.outcome: The workers proceed with the heavy lifting and installation.

scenes.title: Lulei
scenes.action: Lulei decides not to ask questions regarding the client's decision, maintaining his professional boundaries as a consultant. He observes the workers using two lifting mechanisms to unload and install a capsule.

location.name: Construction site
location.description: an area where a capsule is being mounted using heavy machinery

scenes.intent: Lulei wants to fulfill his professional role by providing recommendations without overstepping. He aims to observe the technical process of the installation.
scenes.conflict: The physical strain of the workers is evident as they struggle with the heavy capsule.

outfits.Lulely: business attire suitable for a consultant;Dzyanyan=casual clothing

scenes.relation: Lulei acts as a professional advisor to Dzyanyan
scenes.outcome: The installation process continues under the workers' supervision.

scenes.title: Dzyanyan
scenes.action: After a brief conversation with Lulei, Dzyanyan finishes drinking water and prepares to check her news. Suddenly, her smart home security system triggers an alarm indicating an unauthorized presence at the entrance.

location.name: Dzyanyan's modern house
location.description: a high-tech residence equipped with advanced security sensors and cameras

scenes.intent: Dzyanyan wants to check her news and maintain her home security. She intends to monitor the alert triggered by the system.
scenes.conflict: An unauthorized intrusion is detected at her front door.
scenes.relation: Dzyanyan is the owner of the house being intruded upon
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyan identifies a potential threat through her security interface.

scenes.title: Dzyanyan
scenes.action: Dzyanyan opens her security application to inspect the cameras. She discovers Hei Chunmei, Zhou Guangfu, two young children (Baubo and Beibei), and two elderly people standing at her door.

location.name: Dzyanyan's front door
location.description: a narrow passage blocked by the group of people

scenes.intent: Dzyanyan wants to identify the people standing outside her door. She seeks to understand the nature of the intrusion.
scenes.conflict: The group is physically blocking her entrance and appears to be part of a protest or plea.

outfits.Hei Chunmei: casual clothing;Zhou Guangfu=casual clothing;Baubo=child's clothing;Beibei=child's clothing;Elderly Man=aged clothing;Elderly Woman=aged clothing

scenes.relation: Dzyanyan observes the group from a distance
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyan realizes the group is her neighbors and they are in a state of distress.

scenes.title: Hei Chunmei
scenes.action: Hei Chunmei instructs the children, Baubo and Beibei, to sit in front of Dzyanyan's door. She commands them to beg for entry to escape the heat and to grab Dzyanyan's legs if she refuses.
scenes.intent: Hei Chunmei wants to force Dzyan Yan to open the door by using the children as leverage. She aims to use emotional manipulation to gain access to the air conditioning.
scenes.conflict: The children are hesitant and fearful of their mother's hammer.
scenes.relation: Hei Chunmei is the mother of the children and leader of the group
scenes.outcome: The boy, Baubo, obeys silently while the girl remains more active.

scenes.title: Zhou Shanyu
scenes.action: The elderly man, Zhou Shanyu, reacts with outrage to the idea of begging. He strikes his cane against the ground and pulls his wife away, declaring that he would rather die in the heat than live in shame.

location.name: The narrow passage in front of the door

scenes.intent: Zhou Shanyu wants to preserve his dignity and refuse the act of begging. He intends to retreat from the door to avoid humiliation.
scenes.conflict: His internal pride conflicts with the desperate need for relief from the heat.
scenes.relation: Zhou Shanyu is the husband of the elderly woman
scenes.outcome: He pulls his wife away from the door, attempting to end the confrontation.

scenes.title: Hei Chunmei
scenes.action: Hei Chunmei confronts the elderly couple with harsh truths about the extreme heat and the lack of medical resources. She argues that they must abandon pride because the children are sick and the hospitals are full.
scenes.intent: Hei Chunmei wants to convince the couple to continue the protest. She aims to break their resistance by highlighting the life-threatening situation.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat (47 degrees) and the medical crisis in the city.
scenes.state: Aggressive and forceful, like a machine gun.

outfits.Hei Chunmei: casual clothing;Zhou Shanyu=aged clothing;Elderly Woman=aged clothing

scenes.relation: Hei Chunmei is arguing against the couple's principles
scenes.outcome: She delivers a scathing verbal attack to motivate them.

scenes.title: Zhou Shanyu
scenes.action: Overwhelmed by the intensity of the argument and the heat, Zhou Shanyu becomes enraged. He strikes the floor with his cane so hard that the tiles vibrate, but then suddenly turns pale and collapses.

location.name: The tiled area in front of the door

scenes.intent: Zhou Sharyu wants to express his anger and reject the accusations. He intends to assert his dominance through physical force.
scenes.conflict: The physical and emotional stress of the heat and the argument.
scenes.outcome: Zhou Shanyu collapses onto the floor.

scenes.title: Zhou Guangfu
scenes.action: Upon seeing his father collapse, Zhou Guangfu rushes to pick him up. The children, Baubo and Beibei, jump up in fear, knocking over chairs in the process.

location.name: The area in front of the door

scenes.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to save his father. The children want to react to the sudden chaos.
scenes.conflict: The sudden medical emergency of the patriarch.

outfits.Zhou Guangfu: casual clothing;Baubo=child's clothing;Beibei=child's clothing;Dzyan Lifan=casual clothing

scenes.relation: Zhou Guangfu is the son of the collapsed man
scenes.outcome: The father is lifted into his son's arms.

scenes.title: Hei Chunmei
scenes.action: Despite the chaos, Hei Chunmei regains her composure and instructs Zhou Guangfu to take his father home to rest. She declares her intention to continue knocking on Dzyanyan's door.
scenes.intent: Hei Chunmei wants to maintain the pressure on Dzyanyan. She intends to keep the protest going despite the setback.
scenes.conflict: The physical collapse of the protest leader's father.
scenes.relation: Hei Chunmei is directing Zhou Guangfu
scenes.outcome: Zhou Guangfu begins to move his father away.

scenes.title: Zhou Guangfu
scenes.action: Zhou Guangfu sighs heavily and urges his wife to stop the protest and return home. He is motivated by the need to care for his father and the stability of the family income.

location.name: The path leading away from the door

scenes.intent: Zhou Guangfu wants to end the confrontation and return home. He aims to protect the family's remaining stability.
scenes.conflict: The conflict between his wife's persistence and his need for domestic stability.
scenes.relation: Zhou Guangfu is the husband of Hei Chunmei
scenes.outcome: The group begins to retreat from the door.

scenes.title: Zhou Guangfu
scenes.action: Zhou Guangfu sighs heavily and attempts to persuade his wife to leave the apartment door and return home. He emphasizes the stability of his pension and the lack of value in Lifan. He wants to avoid further conflict and return to the safety of their home.

location.name: Apartment hallway
location.description: outside apartment 3.202, hot and tense atmosphere

scenes.intent: He wants to convince his wife to stop the confrontation and go home. He seeks to avoid escalation and maintain family stability.
scenes.conflict: Hechunmei's extreme anxiety and refusal to leave the children in the heat.
scenes.outcome: He fails to change her mind immediately but prepares to retreat.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei declares her refusal to leave the children to suffer from heatstroke. She expresses her willingness to face imprisonment if it means securing an air conditioner for her children. She commands the children to stay by her side.
scenes.intent: She wants to ensure her children's survival and obtain an air conditioner. She is driven by a desperate need to protect them from the heat.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and the physical symptoms of her children (vomiting and fever).
scenes.outcome: She decides to stay and fight for the apartment.

scenes.title: He Chunintmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei begins violently pounding on the door of apartment 3.202. She screams for the girl inside to open the door immediately. Her actions are fueled by desperation and rage.
scenes.intent: She wants the door to be opened so the children can enter the cooled apartment.
scenes.conflict: The locked door and the lack of response from the resident.
scenes.outcome: The door remains closed, and Zhou Guangfu leads the parents away.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan watches the confrontation through her security camera. She recognizes the situation as a classic case of people fighting over resources. She decides not to open the door to prevent the neighbors from seizing her apartment.
scenes.intent: She wants to protect her resources and prevent the neighbors from taking over her home. She aims to maintain her boundaries during the apocalypse.
scenes.conflict: The persistent and aggressive neighbors threatening her peace and property.
scenes.outcome: She decides to implement a defensive measure.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei threatens to break the door using a small hammer. She swings the hammer at the electronic lock with great force. She is sweating heavily from the heat and the physical exertion.
scenes.intent: She wants to break the electronic lock to gain entry to the apartment.
scenes.conflict: The electronic lock is too strong to be broken by a small hammer.
scenes.outcome: The lock remains intact, and she realizes the door cannot be easily breached.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan activates the apartment's defense system at a minimal level of 110V. She chooses not to kill the intruder because the apocalypse has not fully arrived and children are nearby. She allows the system to react to the physical contact with the door.
scenes.intent: She wants to deter the intruder without causing death. She aims to use a non-lethal warning.
scenes.conflict: The need to defend the apartment versus the ethical constraint of not killing.
scenes.outcome: The system delivers an electric shock to He Chunmei.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei strikes the door with her palm and receives a powerful electric shock. She feels a sensation like thousands of ants biting her skin. She screams in pain and falls back, dropping her hammer.
scenes.intent: She was attempting to force entry through physical force.
scenes.conflict: The electric shock from the activated defense system.
scenes.state: In intense physical pain and shock.
scenes.outcome: She is physically incapacitated by the shock.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei looks through the peephole but sees nothing suspicious. She realizes she has been repelled but begins to formulate a new plan. She decides to recruit other vulnerable neighbors to use collective pressure to take the apartment.
scenes.intent: She wants to organize a group of neighbors to pressure Jiang Yan. She aims to use social and moral pressure to achieve her goal.
scenes.conflict: Her inability to break in alone.
scenes.outcome: She decides to use a group tactic.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei uses her phone to send a message to the building's group chat. She invites neighbors with elderly, children, or pregnant members to contact her regarding the need for air conditioning. She receives an immediate reply from a resident of A71.
scenes.intent: She wants to gather allies for her cause. She seeks to create a coalition of people in need.
scenes.conflict: The difficulty of acting alone against a fortified apartment.
scenes.outcome: She establishes contact with a potential ally.

scenes.title: Lu Lei
scenes.action: Lu Lei and his team finish assembling the apple capsule and installing solar panels. They wait for the cleaning crew to wash the interior and exterior of the equipment. They also receive new supplies like jet suits and irrigation systems.
scenes.intent: He wants to complete the technical setup and ensure all equipment is clean and functional. He aims to prepare for the upcoming challenges.
scenes.conflict: The need for thorough cleaning and the logistical management of new arrivals.
scenes.outcome: The equipment is ready and stored.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan collects the newly arrived equipment and supplies into her storage space. She prepares for a break before the bank opens. She eats a meal of spicy cold beef noodles and a coconut milk cocktail.
scenes.intent: She wants to secure her resources and nourish herself. She aims to maintain her strength and energy.
scenes.conflict: Hunger and the need for replenishment.
scenes.outcome: She successfully stores the items and eats her meal.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan retrieves a portion of cold beef noodles and a coconut milk cocktail from her spatial storage to eat. She enjoys the spicy, sour taste of the noodles she previously bought from a small, hidden shop. She sits on a bench to rest and eat her meal.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to quickly eat a meal to regain energy. She seeks a moment of rest during her busy day. She wants to enjoy the specific taste of her favorite noodles.
scenes.conflict: The heat of the day is approaching. She must balance her need for rest with her upcoming travel.
scenes.state: Calm and focused on the meal.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan finishes her meal and prepares for her next task.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan decides not to enter her temperature-controlled storage space to avoid a sudden temperature shock. She prepares herself for a long day of traveling through the intense heat. She retrieves a brand new Harley motorcycle from her spatial storage.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyenu wants to avoid getting sick from temperature changes. She intends to start her journey to the bank. She wants to use the most efficient vehicle for her needs.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat of the street threatens her health. The transition from storage to the outside is physically risky.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan begins her journey on the motorcycle.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan rides the unregistered Harley motorcycle at full speed toward the bank. She acknowledges the risk of being fined or having the bike confiscated by the police. She prioritizes saving time due to the approaching apocalypse over legal compliance.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to reach the bank as quickly as possible. She aims to secure her assets before the situation worsens. She intends to bypass legal risks to save time.
scenes.conflict: The motorcycle is illegal and lacks license plates. The threat of police intervention and vehicle seizure exists. The approaching apocalypse creates extreme urgency.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan reaches her destination despite the legal risks.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan arrives at the bank and observes the skyrocketing price of gold, which has risen from 800 to over 2000 yuan per gram. She notices the panic and the crowd of people rushing to jewelry stores to buy gold. She decides to bypass the queues by using her mother's VIP status.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to purchase gold bullion. She aims to avoid the long lines of panicked citizens. She intends to use her family connections to expedite the process.
scenes.conflict: Gold prices are rising rapidly due to economic panic. Jewelry stores are overcrowded with people seeking protection.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan successfully acquires gold.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan visits a gold refinery belonging to a major brand to utilize her mother's VIP status. She also retrieves family jewelry from the bank's vault. After completing her transactions, she mounts her motorcycle to head toward the Tianshuiwan residential area.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to complete her gold purchase at the refinery. She intends to collect her family's precious jewelry. She aims to return to her residential area.
scenes.conflict: The need to move quickly before the situation deteriorates. The pressure of the ongoing economic crisis.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan departs for Tianshuiwan with her new assets.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan rides through the city, listening to news via her Bluetooth headset. She observes the extreme 50-degree heat, the melting asphalt, and the crowds of people fainting from the heat. She sees long lines at gas stations, shops, and pharmacies.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyuan wants to stay informed about the current situation. She is navigating through a chaotic urban landscape. She intends to reach her destination safely.
scenes.conflict: The extreme temperature of 50 degrees Celsius. The physical danger of the melting asphalt. The chaos of crowded essential services.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan continues her journey through the heat.

scenes.title: Dzyanyuan
scenes.action: Dzyanyuan observes the social breakdown, including people bypassing security to find air conditioning in malls and the overcrowding of the metro. She notes that people are working in offices despite work-from-home orders just to escape the heat. She sees the threat of giant mosquitoes and the danger of car fires.
scenes.intent: Dzyanyuan is monitoring the level of societal collapse. She observes the various ways people are struggling to survive the heat. She is aware of the biological threats.
scenes.conflict: The threat of giant mosquitoes. The danger of vehicle fires and building fires. The breakdown of social order and security.
scenes.outcome: Dzyanyuan gains a full picture of the escalating crisis.

scenes.title: Jou Guangfu
scenes.action: In Tianshuiwan, Jou Guangfu helps his father into their home and ensures his condition is stable. He grabs his electric bicycle keys and rushes outside. He realizes the family needs to restock food and medicine, especially for the children.
scenes.intent: Jou Guangfu wants to ensure his father's safety. He intends to go out and replenish much-needed supplies. He aims to protect his family from the growing scarcity.
scenes.conflict: The depletion of essential medicines like fever reducers and aspirin. The difficulty of accessing hospitals due to massive queues. The threat of giant mosquitoes.
scenes.relation: Jou Guangfu is caring for his father.
scenes.outcome: Jou Guangfu leaves the house to find supplies.

scenes.title: Jou Guangfu's Family
scenes.action: Jou Guangfu's mother helps care for the grandchildren by wiping their bodies with wet towels to lower their fever. The young boy wipes himself with water from a basin. The apartment is stiflingly hot like a sauna, and the water from the tap is scalding hot.
scenes.intent: The mother wants to reduce the children's fever. The boy wants to clean himself. The family aims to survive the heat and the mosquito threat.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat inside the apartment. The lack of cold water. The threat of giant mosquitoes entering through windows. The scarcity of water.
scenes.relation: The mother is caretaking for the children.
scenes.outcome: The family remains trapped in the heat, struggling to maintain health.

scenes.title: Haechun Mei
scenes.action: Haechun Mei stays in her sweltering apartment, observing the extreme heat and the lack of cold water. She decides to keep her plan to attack the neighbors in apartment 3201 a secret from her husband and the general residents' chat. She prepares for a coordinated action with other residents.

location.name: Haechun Mei's apartment
location.description: a top-floor unit that feels like a sauna with closed windows and hot running water

scenes.intent: She wants to organize a group to seize access to a cooled room. She intends to act without alerting her husband to avoid domestic conflict.
scenes.conflict: The unbearable heat and the depletion of cold water supplies. The physical discomfort of the environment threatens their survival.

outfits.Haechun Mei: casual home clothing suitable for extreme heat.

scenes.outcome: The plan is set in motion in secret.

scenes.title: Haechun Mei
scenes.action: A crowd of over twenty people gathers on the 32nd floor, consisting mostly of young mothers and two pregnant women. Some mothers, seeing their children's health declining due to the heat, join the group after reading Haechun Mei's message. The group prepares to confront the neighbor.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: a crowded area filled with distressed residents

scenes.intent: The mothers want to protect their children from heatstroke. They seek to find a way to access air-conditioned space.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat is causing health issues in children and the elderly. The moral dilemma of invading someone else's space.
scenes.relation: The residents unite under Haechun Mei's leadership.
scenes.outcome: A large, motivated group is formed.

scenes.title: Haechun Mei
scenes.action: The group arrives at the target location but discovers there is no ready air conditioner to take. Haechun Mei proposes a new plan: to collectively demand access to the cooled room. Some residents feel uncomfortable with this immoral approach and leave the group.
scenes.intent: Haechun Mei wants to pivot the plan from taking a machine to demanding entry to the room. She aims to maintain the group's momentum.
scenes.conflict: The lack of a physical object to seize. The moral conflict regarding the legality and ethics of their actions.

outfits.Haechun Mei: casual summer attire; Residents=various summer clothes

scenes.relation: Tension between the leader and the morally hesitant members.
scenes.outcome: The group splits into those who leave and those who stay.

scenes.title: Haechun and a Young Girl
scenes.action: Haechun Mei stands at a distance from the door, holding a megaphone found in a storage closet. A young girl from the crowd questions the legality of their plan, searching for information on her phone. Haechun Mei avoids knocking on the door to prevent a repeat of a previous confrontation involving a stun gun.
scenes.intent: Haechun Mei wants to use noise to force the neighbor, Zian Yan, out of the apartment. The girl wants to verify if their actions are lawful.
scenes.conflict: The fear of legal repercussions and the memory of past violent encounters. The heat makes using phones difficult.
scenes.state: Haechun Mei is strategic; the girl is cautious.
scenes.relation: The girl acts as a skeptical subordinate.
scenes.outcome: The legality of the protest is brought into question.

scenes.title: Young Girl and the Crowd
scenes.action: The young girl reads aloud from her phone that blocking doors is a civil offense and a violation of freedom of movement. The crowd falls silent as they process this legal information. The heat causes the phones to overheat, making the task difficult.
scenes.intent: The girl intends to inform the group of the legal risks. The crowd seeks clarity on their standing.
scenes.conflict: The legal definition of their actions as a crime. The physical difficulty of using technology in the heat.
scenes.state: The crowd is stunned and contemplative.
scenes.relation: The crowd listens to the girl's findings.
scenes.outcome: A moment of hesitation occurs within the group.

scenes.title: Haechun Mei and Residents
scenes.action: Haechun Mei dismisses the concern about the law, noting that most security guards have been called to the police due to manpower shortages. Another woman joins in, noting that riots and looting are happening elsewhere, making the law currently ineffective. The group discusses the chaos of the current era.
scenes.intent: Haechun Mei wants to invalidate the fear of the law. The woman wants to validate the sense of lawlessness.
scenes.conflict: The breakdown of social order and the absence of police presence. The fear of the "end of the world."
scenes.state: Haechun Mei is indignant; the woman is cynical.
scenes.relation: The women reinforce each other's cynicism.
scenes.outcome: The group begins to feel that the law cannot protect the neighbor.

scenes.title: A Mother and the Crowd
scenes.action: A mother mentions that the police won't bother with small matters because they are overwhelmed by the heat and the "end of the world." She shares a story about her husband being pushed away while trying to buy a refrigerator. The crowd discusses the scarcity of cooling resources.
scenes.intent: The mother wants to highlight the desperation of the situation. The crowd seeks to vent their frustrations.
scenes.conflict: The extreme scarcity of cooling appliances and the breakdown of commerce. The struggle to survive the heat.
scenes.relation: The mother shares personal hardship with the group.
scenes.outcome: The sense of shared struggle deepens the group's resolve.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi expresses her anger, accusing the neighbor of being an egoist for using air conditioning alone while others suffer. She reveals her personal tragedy: her son is sick with fever, and her husband died because of the neighbor's actions. She expresses a desire to physically crush the neighbor.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to condemn the neighbor's selfishness. She seeks vengeance for her family's loss.
scenes.conflict: The neighbor's perceived selfishness versus the group's need. Zhang Qiqi's personal vendetta and past debt.
scenes.state: Zhang Qiqi is boiling with hatred.
scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi becomes the emotional catalyst for the group.
scenes.outcome: The group's anger is redirected toward a specific target.

scenes.title: Haechun Mei
scenes.action: Haechun Mei notices the hesitation in the crowd and uses the threat of heatstroke to motivate them. She reminds them that doctors warn of death from heatstroke and that hospitals are full. Her speech successfully pushes the remaining hesitant members, including an elderly man, to stay.
scenes.intent: Haechun Mei wants to eliminate any remaining doubt. She aims to use fear for the children's safety to solidify the group.
scenes.conflict: The fear of death and the medical crisis. The internal struggle of the elderly man to leave.
scenes.state: Haechun Mei is manipulative and motivating.
scenes.relation: Haechun Mei takes command of the group's emotions.
scenes.outcome: The group's resolve is fully strengthened.

scenes.title: Pregnant Woman and Haechun Mei
scenes.action: A pregnant woman mentions seeing a beautiful, strangely dressed woman leaving the building earlier that morning. Haechun Mei realizes this explains why the neighbor hasn't opened the door. The group begins to formulate a plan to wait for the neighbor's return.
scenes.intent: The woman provides new information. Haechun Mei wants to interpret this information to refine the plan.
scenes.conflict: The mystery of the stranger's identity. The uncertainty of when the target will return.
scenes.state: The woman is observant; Haechun Mei is realization-driven.
scenes.relation: New information links the group to the neighbor's movements.
scenes.outcome: The group decides to wait for the neighbor.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi and Haechun Mei
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi proposes a more aggressive plan: if the neighbor won't open the door, they will take the keys. She notes the neighbor has a fingerprint and code lock, but she remains undeterred. Haechun Mei nods, agreeing to the plan of waiting and waiting for the opportunity.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to seize the apartment by force. Haechun Mei wants to execute the plan of waiting.
scenes.conflict: The high-tech security of the apartment (fingerprint/code). The physical difficulty of bypassing the lock.
scenes.state: Zhang Qiqi is cunning and determined; Haechun Mei is resolute.
scenes.relation: The two leaders align on a new, more aggressive strategy.
scenes.outcome: The group commits to a siege-like waiting tactic.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi makes eye contact with Hechun Mei and nods to signal a shared plan to wait. She decides to stay put since there is no urgent business and her children are resting at home. She observes the growing crowd's determination.

location.name: Residential courtyard
location.description: a crowded area outside apartment buildings during a heatwave

scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to coordinate a plan with Hechun Mei to wait out the heat. She aims to maintain a calm facade despite the tension.
scenes.conflict: The intense heat and the growing unrest of the crowd.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: A tight-fitting dress with a floral pattern that emphasizes her slender figure.

scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi and Hechun Mei are allies/neighbors.
scenes.outcome: The two women agree to wait together.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi asks Hechun Mei if she has disposable cups available. She uses a flirtatious gesture, adjusting her long hair, to mask her true intentions. She proposes a plan to make a plum drink for everyone.

location.name: Residential courtyard
location.description: near the entrance of the apartment block

scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to obtain cups to facilitate a social gathering. She intends to use the drink as a way to bring her son into the group.
scenes.conflict: Hechun Mei is initially surprised by the request.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: A tight-fitting dress with a floral pattern; Hechun Mei=Not specified

scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi is acting friendly toward Hechun Mei.
scenes.outcome: The idea of making a drink is presented to the crowd.

scenes.title: The Crowd
scenes.action: The gathered neighbors begin whispering and admiring Zhang Qiqi's youth and beauty. A woman who previously protested the door blockade expresses shock at Qiqi's motherhood. Other women comment on her fit physique and fresh face.
scenes.intent: The neighbors want to gossip and evaluate Zhang Qiqi's character.
scenes.conflict: The neighbors' judgment of the "selfish" resident in apartment 3021.

outfits.Zhang Qiqi: Floral tight dress; A young woman=Not specified; A middle-aged woman=Not specified

scenes.relation: The crowd views Zhang Qiqi as a model of good neighborliness.
scenes.outcome: Zhang Qiqi gains social approval and becomes the center of positive attention.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: A pregnant woman asks Zhang Qiqi about her husband's occupation and why he left her alone in the heat. Zhang Qiqi lies, claiming her husband is a distant sailor facing hardships at sea. She pretends to sigh heavily to gain sympathy.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to hide the truth about her husband's absence. She aims to deflect curiosity about her private life.
scenes.conflict: The pregnant woman's intrusive curiosity about her husband.
scenes.relation: The pregnant woman is interrogating Zhang Qiqi.
scenes.outcome: Zhang Qiqi successfully creates a sympathetic persona through a lie.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: The neighbors praise the high salary of a sailor and congratulate Qiqi on her beauty. Zhang Qiqi feels internal conflict and tension despite her forced smile. She quickly ends the conversation to go fetch the plum powder.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to escape the intense questioning. She needs to retrieve the supplies she promised.
scenes.conflict: The pressure of social scrutiny and the heat.
scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi is distancing herself from the group.
scenes.outcome: Zhang Qiqi leaves the crowd toward the elevator.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: As soon as the elevator doors close, Zhang Qiqi's expression shifts from charming to cold and stern. She drops her social mask entirely.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to regain her true composure.
scenes.conflict: The need to maintain a facade in public.
scenes.state: Cold and severe.|Outting: Zhang Qiqi=Not specified
scenes.outcome: Her true personality is revealed in private.

scenes.title: Hechun Mei
scenes.action: Hechun Mei proposes that the majority of the neighbors move to her apartment to wait out the heat. She suggests a rotation where some stay outside to watch for the elevator's arrival at the 30th floor. The exhausted crowd agrees to the plan.
scenes.intent: Hechun Mei wants to organize the crowd for safety and comfort. She aims to keep a lookout for the residents.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and exhaustion of the neighbors.
scenes.relation: Hechun Mei takes charge of the group.
scenes.outcome: The neighbors agree to move to Hechun Mei's home.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan returns to the Cianshuiwan complex around 5 PM in 55-degree heat. She enters a quiet alleyway to hide her motorcycle in a secret storage spot to avoid cameras. She prepares a backpack with noodles and paper towels to look like a normal shopper.

location.name: A quiet alleyway near Cianshuiwan complex

scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid detection by surveillance. She aims to maintain a cover story of being a regular shopper.
scenes.conflict: The extreme temperature and the need for secrecy.

outfits.Jiang Yan: A strange hat (later removed), a cap, and sunglasses

scenes.outcome: She successfully hides her motorcycle and prepares her disguise.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan enters the residential complex and discovers dead black birds and a dead cat on the ground. She observes the carnage caused by the heat. She notices the intense heat is even felt through her clothing.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reach her apartment. She observes the environmental impact of the heat.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and the sight of dead animals.
scenes.outcome: She continues toward her building despite the grim scene.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan enters the elevator, noting that her smart home system has been silent. She reaches the 32nd floor and steps out of the elevator. Upon opening the doors, she freezes in shock at a sight that haunts her.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to return to her apartment. She is interrupted by a traumatic discovery.
scenes.conflict: An unexpected and shocking scene at her doorstep.
scenes.outcome: She is left staring at a life-altering sight.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan assumes Hunm will not disturb her and enters the elevator while carrying a heavy load. She travels up to the thirty-second floor. Upon the doors opening, she stops abruptly in shock.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to return to her apartment and rest. She intends to avoid any confrontation with Hunm. She seeks to reach her home undisturbed.
scenes.conflict: The physical weight of the load she carries. The unexpected sight of a crowd blocking her path.
scenes.state: Initially calm and unbothered, then suddenly shocked and frozen.

outfits.Jiang Yan: Wearing sunglasses that hide her facial expressions.

scenes.outcome: She discovers a crowd blocking her apartment entrance.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan steps out of the elevator and sees a crowd of about ten people, including men, women, the elderly, and pregnant women, blocking the narrow passage. The crowd turns to stare at her with a mix of hope, hostility, and envy. She recognizes He Chunmei and Zhang Qiqi leading the group.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: a narrow passage blocked by a crowd of diverse neighbors

scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to assess the situation and identify the leaders. She seeks to understand why the neighbors are gathered at her door.
scenes.conflict: The crowd is physically obstructing her path. The neighbors' gazes are filled with malice and resentment.
scenes.state: Shocked, then deeply irritated and physically tense.

outfits.Jiang and neighbors: Not specifically described beyond the presence of various ages and types.

scenes.relation: Jiang Yan recognizes the hostility of the neighbors and the alliance between He Chunmei and Zhang Qiqi.
scenes.outcome: She realizes her neighbors have formed an alliance against her.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei approaches Jiang Yan with a forced smile and greets her. She claims the neighbors want to stay in Jiang Yan's apartment because it has two air conditioners. She hides her previous malice to avoid looking rude in front of the neighbors.

location.name: 32nd floor hallway
location.description: in front of Jiang Yan's apartment

scenes.intent: He Chunmei wants to secure a place to stay in the air-conditioned apartment. She wants to avoid being excluded from the group's plan. She aims to manipulate Jiang Yan without causing a public scene.
scenes.conflict: Her previous hatred for Jiang Yan conflicts with her need to be polite. The risk of being rejected by the group if she is too aggressive.
scenes.relation: He Chunmei is acting as a deceptive negotiator toward Jiang Yan.
scenes.outcome: She presents a demand for housing under the guise of a polite request.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan looks coldly at the crowd, expressing her irritation. She asks the crowd if they are certain they intend to continue standing there. She uses her voice to exert pressure and a sense of reproach.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to reclaim her space and force the crowd to move. She intends to intimidate them into leaving her doorstep.
scenes.conflict: The crowd's physical presence and their refusal to move. The social pressure of the gathered neighbors.
scenes.state: Cold, irritated, and authoritative.|Outably: Jiang Yan=Wearing sunglasses that hide her eyes.
scenes.relation: Jiang Yan asserts dominance over the gathered neighbors.
scenes.outcome: The crowd falls silent and turns to look at the leaders, Zhang Qiqi and He Chunmei.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi feels a tremor of fear because Jiang Yan's voice sounds familiar. She recognizes the facial features of Jiang Yan, recalling a person from her past. She remembers her secret connection to Jiang Yan's deceased mother through Sundemin.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to process the recognition of Jiang Yan's identity. She seeks to reconcile her past knowledge with the current person standing before her.
scenes.conflict: The internal conflict of recognizing a target she previously stalked as a hater. The fear of being identified.
scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi recognizes Jiang Yan's lineage but believes she is still unrecognized.
scenes.outcome: She realizes the connection between Jiang Yan and the person she used to spy on.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi recalls her history as a hater of Jiang Yan's blog and her secret surveillance of her. She concludes that Jiang Yan could not be the billionaire's daughter hiding from justice because she lives in such an old complex. She then decides to propose a financial deal to the group.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants to limit the number of people who want to stay in the apartment. She intends to use a high price to ensure only she and her son can stay comfortably. She wants to avoid sharing the space with the elderly.
scenes.conflict: The desire to live comfortably versus the need to appear part of the group's movement. The risk of being seen as greedy.
scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi manipulates the group's expectations.
scenes.outcome: She proposes a price of 500 yuan per person per day.

scenes.title: Neighbors
scenes.action: The neighbors are stunned by the high price of 500 yuan per person. He Chunmei looks at Zhang Qiqi in surprise at the audacity of the amount. The crowd realizes Zhang Qiqi is intentionally inflating the price.
scenes.intent: The neighbors want to understand the sudden change in the negotiation. He Chunmei wants to gauge Zhang Qict's true intention.
scenes.conflict: The extreme cost of the proposed stay. The shock of the sudden price hike.
scenes.relation: The neighbors are reacting to Zhang Qiqi's manipulation.
scenes.outcome: The crowd is left in a state of disbelief.

scenes.title: Zhang Qiqi
scenes.action: Zhang Qiqi tells her son, Song Fei, to try and persuade the "beautiful aunt" (Jiang Yan). She pats her son on the shoulder to encourage him. She watches Jiang Yan's reaction closely.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qiqi wants her son to help negotiate the deal. She intends to use her son as a tool for persuasion.
scenes.conflict: The difficulty of persuading someone who is clearly uninterested.
scenes.relation: Zhang Qiqi is directing her son to interact with Jiang Yan.
scenes.outcome: The plan is interrupted by Jiang Yan's sudden movement.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan suddenly turns around and walks back toward the elevator. She presses the button to call the elevator and descends to the first floor. She leaves the crowd behind without saying a word.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to escape the confrontation. She intends to avoid the negotiation and the crowd entirely.
scenes.conflict: The crowd's presence and the ongoing negotiation attempt.
scenes.relation: Jiang Yan abandons the confrontation with the neighbors.
scenes.outcome: The crowd is left in a state of total shock.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunly assures the crowd that Jiang Yan will return. She pulls Zhang Qiqi toward a window and instructs her to alert the group if the elevator starts going back up. She remains vigilant for Jiang Yan's return.
scenes.intent: He Chunmei wants to maintain the blockade. She intends to catch Jiang Yan when she returns.
scenes.conflict: The uncertainty of whether Jiang Yan will actually come back.
scenes.relation: He Chunmei takes charge of the group's monitoring.
scenes.outcome: Zhang Qiqi agrees to watch the elevator.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan reaches the first floor but does not exit the building. Instead, she slips into the stairwell to think. She realizes that calling the police is useless due to overloaded lines and that a direct confrontation is too dangerous. She considers using a jetpack from her spatial storage.

location.name: First floor stairwell of the apartment building

scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to devise a plan to get home safely. She intends to avoid a public shootout or a physical fight with the crowd. She seeks a way to bypass the blockade.
scenes.conflict: Overloaded police lines. The impossibility of a direct physical breakthrough against a crowd. The risk of a public scene.
scenes.outcome: She decides that she needs a more sophisticated plan than just running or fighting.

scenes.title: Dzyanyan
scenes.action: Dzyanyan examines her jetpack and contemplates her escape options. She considers hiding in a secluded place or returning home through a window at night. She decides that running away is a sign of weakness that would embolden her neighbors.

location.name: Dzyanyan's apartment
location.description: a room containing a jetpack inspired by Bear Grylls' show.

scenes.intent: Dzyanyan wants to avoid appearing weak to her neighbors. She aims to establish a position of strength to stop the bullying once and for all.
scenes.conflict: The pressure from neighbors and the specific provocation from Zhang Qiqi.
props: A jetpack capable of 8-10 minutes of flight at 18/800m altitude.
scenes.relation: Dzyanyan views her neighbors as oppressors.
scenes.outcome: She decides to confront her enemies instead of fleeing.

scenes.title: Dzyanyan
scenes.action: Dzyanyan checks her surroundings to ensure she is alone. She accesses her spatial storage to retrieve a powerful German-made lithium chainsaw with a 15m blade. She activates the saw, listening to its piercing hum with satisfaction.

location.name: Dzyanyan's apartment
location.description: near the spatial storage access point.

scenes.intent: Dzyanyan wants to prepare a weapon for confrontation. She seeks a tool that can effectively intimidate or strike back.
scenes.conflict: The need for a powerful weapon to face the crowd.
scenes.state: Cunning and satisfied with a smirk.
scenes.relation: Dzyanyan is preparing for a physical confrontation.
scenes.outcome: She successfully arms herself and begins moving up the stairs.

scenes.title: Hechun
scenes.action: Songfei notices the elevator rising. Hechun tells Zhang Qiqi that Dzyanyan is returning. She warns that the arrival coincides with the time when blood mosquitoes begin their mass attack.
scenes.intent: Hechun wants to warn Zhang Qiqi about the danger of Dzyanyan's return. She aims to predict the timing of the mosquito attack.
scenes.conflict: The impending arrival of Dzyanyan and the biological threat of the mosquitoes.

outfits.Hechun: Not specified; Zhang Qiqi=Not specified; Songly=Not specified.

scenes.relation: Hechun is acting as a protective/instructive figure to Zhang Qiqi.
scenes.outcome: The group becomes aware of the timing of the potential conflict.

scenes.title: The Crowd
scenes.action: The protesters realize the severity of the situation due to the government warning about blood mosquitoes. They recall the instruction to stay indoors and close windows before 5:30 PM. Some residents from other buildings are also present.
scenes.intent: The crowd wants to continue their siege of apartment 3.201. They aim to capture the apartment despite the biological risk.
scenes.conflict: The danger of the blood mosquito attack versus the desire to complete the siege.
scenes.relation: The crowd is united in their goal to take the apartment.
scenes.outcome: The group decides to stay and continue the protest despite the danger.

scenes.title: The Crowd
scenes.action: The elevator struggles to reach the 32nd floor because it keeps stopping at other levels. This is caused by the heavy flow of residents returning home. The crowd begins to feel doubt about Dzyanness's actual arrival.
scenes.intent: The crowd wants the elevator to reach the target floor. They are waiting for visual confirmation of Dzyanyan.
scenes.conflict: The physical delay of the elevator due to other residents.
scenes.relation: The crowd is waiting for a specific person.
scenes.outcome: Uncertainty grows among the protesters.

scenes.title: Su Dai and Sun Zhentao
scenes.action: A young couple, Su Dai and Sun Zhentao, exits apartment 3.24. The man is muscular with short hair, and the woman has a high ponytail. They are wearing athletic clothes and fitness bracelets.
scenes.intent: The couple is returning home after a walk. They are simply moving through the building.
scenes.conflict: They are walking into the middle of a protest.

outfits.fitness bracelet;Sun Zhentao: Light athletic clothing, short hair, muscular build, fitness bracelet.

scenes.relation: They are neighbors to the protesters.
scenes.outcome: They encounter the group of protesters.

scenes.title: Hechun
scenes.action: Hechun enthusiastically greets the couple and invites them to join the protest. She suggests they all go to Dzyanyan's apartment to enjoy the powerful air conditioning.
scenes.intent: Hechun wants to expand the group of protesters. She aims to recruit the couple by offering the comfort of air conditioning.
scenes.conflict: The couple's refusal to participate in the social pressure.
scenes.state: Enthusiastic and welcoming.|Outras: Hechun=Not specified;Su Dai=Light athletic clothing;Sun Zhentao=Light athletic clothing.
scenes.relation: Hechun is trying to manipulate the couple into joining the "front".
scenes.outcome: The couple refuses the invitation.

scenes.title: Su Dai and Hechun
scenes.action: Su Dai politely refuses Hechun's invitation to join the group. Hechun becomes visibly upset and tries to use the heat as a way to pressure them further. Su Dai remains calm and refuses to be provoked.
scenes.intent: Su Dai wants to avoid the conflict and stay neutral. Hechun wants to force them to join the group.
scenes.conflict: Hechun's social pressure versus Su Dai's refusal.
scenes.state: Hechun is offended and prideful;Su Dai is calm and composed.
scenes.outcome: The tension between the neighbors increases.

scenes.title: Sun Zhentao and Hechun
scenes.action: Sun Zhentao intervenes sharply, accusing Hechun of creating a "circus" and dividing neighbors into fronts. Hechun retaliates by accusing him of being unfair and demanding justice for the heat. Sun Zhentively argues that people should help voluntarily, not through coercion.
scenes.intent: Sun Zhentao wants to stop the bullying and defend the principle of voluntary help. Hechun wants to justify the group's actions as a quest for justice.
scenes.conflict: Ideological clash between community solidarity (forced) and individual freedom (voluntary).
scenes.state: Sun Zhentao is firm and stern;Hechun is angry and defensive.
scenes.relation: Sun Zhentao is confronting Hechun's leadership.
scenes.outcome: The argument escalates into a heated debate.

scenes.title: Sun Zhentao and Su Dai
scenes.action: Hechun makes a stinging comment about children suffering in the heat, hitting a sensitive spot for the couple. Su Dai becomes pale and clenches her fists in anger. Sun Zhentao steps in to calm his wife and tells her not to pay attention to the insults.
scenes.intent: Hechun wants to hurt the couple emotionally. Sun Zhentao wants to protect his wife from the emotional attack.
scenes.conflict: Hechun's verbal attack against the couple's personal feelings.
scenes.state: Hechun is malicious;Su Dai is distressed and angry;Sun Zhentao is protective.

outfits.Sun Zhentao: Light athletic clothing;Su Dai=Light athletic clothing;Hechun=Not specified.

scenes.outcome: The couple is emotionally shaken but remains physically apart from the group.
