scenes.intent: Residents want to provide light for themselves during the blackout. They attempt to use traditional methods like candles.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat melts the candles, making them difficult to use. The lack of electricity limits their options.
scenes.state: Precautionary and struggling with the heat.|Outlam: Residents manage to maintain some light using various devices and stabilized candles.
scenes.outcome: Minimal light is maintained despite the heat-induced difficulty.

scenes.title: Residents
scenes.action: Water supply ceases on the upper floors simultaneously with the electricity outage. While lower floors continue their activities under dim light, the temperature continues to rise, fueling growing fear and panic among the population.
scenes.intent: Residents are trying to continue their daily routines despite the lack of water and light. They are attempting to cope with the rising heat.
scenes.conflict: The loss of water supply on upper floors adds to the crisis. The rising temperature increases the level of fear.
scenes.outcome: The situation becomes increasingly dire as heat and fear escalate.

scenes.title: Residents
scenes.action: SCNE: The Wi-Fi signal disappears, but mobile communication remains functional due to battery backups and cooling compressors at base stations. A resident group chat explodes with over 999 messages. Residents argue about requesting backup power from the management company, while others search for medicine or alcohol burners.
scenes.intent: Residents are communicating via group chat to share information and vent frustrations. Some are looking for essential supplies like medicine.
scenes.conflict: The loss of Wi-Fi limits communication. The massive influx of messages creates digital chaos. There is tension between residents and the management company.
scenes.state: Angry, frantic, and some are trying to remain optimistic.
scenes.relation: Residents are in conflict with the management company.
scenes.outcome: The group chat becomes a hub of intense debate and urgent information seeking.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan verifies that her intrusion protection system's backup power is functioning correctly. Satisfied with her security, she retreats to her private, luxurious capsule. She decides to stay hidden and avoid drawing attention during the first night of the blackout.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure her security system is operational. She intends to remain unnoticed and comfortable.
scenes.conflict: The external world is in chaos and extreme heat, which she must avoid.
scenes.outcome: She successfully secures her environment and prepares for rest.

scenes.title: Management Company
scenes.action: At midnight, the management company posts a message in the group chat stating that backup generators will not be connected to residential floors. They explain that the outage is a protective measure against grid overload caused by the heat. They announce that the underground parking will be used for cooling purposes.
scenes.intent: The management company wants to explain the reason for the blackout and manage the use of resources. They aim to protect the electrical grid.
scenes.conflict: The decision to withhold power from residents causes significant resentment and criticism.
scenes.relation: Management company is the target of resident criticism.
scenes.outcome: Residents receive news that increases their dissatisfaction.

scenes.title: Management Company
scenes.action: SCNE: The management company announces that the underground parking will serve as a temporary cooling zone. They warn residents that all cars must be moved by 8:00 AM to avoid the activity of giant mosquitoes. They also announce that all city shelters in Anming will open the following day, provided residents register in advance.
scenes.intent: The company aims to manage the parking area and prepare for the mass use of shelters. They want to prevent chaos through a registration system.
scenes.conflict: The threat of giant mosquitoes and the need for organized shelter access.
scenes.outcome: Residents are informed of the new rules and the availability of shelters.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Inside her private space, Jiang Yan enjoys a perfectly controlled environment with sunlight, automated systems, and the scent of chinxiang incense. She uses blackout curtains to maintain her privacy. While the outside world is like a steamer, her room remains at an ideal temperature and humidity.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to maintain a comfortable, cozy, and private atmosphere. She seeks to insulate herself from the external heat.
scenes.conflict: The extreme external heat and humidity threaten her comfort.
scenes.outcome: She achieves a state of perfect environmental control.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: After two months of chaos, Jiang Yan falls into a deep sleep. The next morning at 7:30 AM, her automated curtains open, letting in sunlight. She wakes up, stretches, and begins her day in her serene environment.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to rest and recover from recent stresses. She follows her morning routine.
scenes.conflict: None.
scenes.outcome: She wakes up refreshed and ready for the day.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: While observing her surroundings, Jiang Yan contemplates planting roses and hydrangeas in the black soil she has available. She also experiences a moment of loneliness and considers getting a small pet, like a yellow-winged parrot, but hesitates due to her fear of loss.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to engage in gardening and considers companionship. She contemplates the possibility of a pet.
scenes.conflict: Her internal emotional trauma and fear of attachment prevent her from pursuing a pet.
scenes.outcome: She decides to focus on planting but remains emotionally guarded.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan prepares her breakfast consisting of a green onion pancake and coffee. She adds milk, sugar, and a few drops of 52% ABV Baijiu to create her unique "sauce latte."
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to prepare a flavorful breakfast to start her day. She seeks to enhance her coffee with a specific alcoholic twist.
scenes.conflict: She feels a lack of flavor in the initial coffee preparation.
scenes.outcome: She successfully creates her unique alcoholic coffee drink.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan reviews her daily schedule, which includes fitness, shooting, excavator and yacht training, and gardening. She decides to check her security cameras and the residents' chat for news.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to stay informed about her residential complex. She plans to manage her time effectively through monitoring.
scenes.conflict: She needs to check for any recent updates or threats in the building.
scenes.outcome: She discovers an unpleasant man approaching her door on the screen.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: The security system triggers a threat alert as Jiang Yan observes a middle-aged man, Zhang Qimin, approaching her door. She recognizes him as the committee chairman.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify the person approaching her door. She observes the intruder's identity.
scenes.conflict: An unexpected guest is approaching her private residence, triggering a security alert.
scenes.outcome: She identifies the man as Zhang Qimin.

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin stands outside the door, looking disheveled and sweaty due to the extreme heat. His hair is matted with sweat, and his skin is glistening with a mixture of oil and water.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qimin is attempting to reach Jiang Yan's apartment.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and lack of water have made him physically miserable.
scenes.outcome: He waits by the door and prepares to call her.

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin attempts to call Jiang Yan via voice call. Jiang Yan immediately presses the button to reject the call, leaving him with a "number unavailable" message.

location.name: Inside Jiang Yan's apartment / Hallway outside

scenes.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to contact Jiang Yan directly. Jiang Yan wants to avoid the interaction.
scenes.conflict: Jiang Yan actively rejects his attempt to communicate.
scenes.state: Jiang Yan is avoidant; Zhang Qimin is initially persistent.
scenes.outcome: The call is disconnected, but Zhang Qimin realizes she is likely ignoring him.

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin decides to knock on the metal door. As soon as his hand touches the surface, a strong electric shock from a 110V low-voltage defense system jolts through his body.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to get her attention by knocking.
scenes.conflict: The door is electrified, causing a painful physical shock.
scenes.outcome: He is physically jolted and experiences a sensation of burning.

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin recoils in pain, convulsing and shouting after the shock. He realizes the intensity of the discharge due to his sweaty hands.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qimin tries to recover from the physical shock.
scenes.conflict: The electric shock causes intense pain and physical convulsions.
scenes.outcome: He pulls back in fear, his face turning pale.

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin gathers his courage to shout through the door, calling her "Xiaojiang" and claiming he has an important matter. He also offers his portable batteries for her to charge her phone.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to initiate a conversation and offer a way to help her charge her phone. Jiang Yan wants to remain unheard.
scenes.conflict: He is trying to force an interaction while she is intentionally ignoring him.
scenes.state: Zhang Qimin is desperate and persistent; Jiang Yan is irritated.
scenes.relation: He uses a familiar, somewhat flirtatious tone.
scenes.outcome: Jiang Yan becomes more irritated by his presence.

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin realizes the shock was not static electricity but a real electric shock. He deduces that Jiang Yan must have backup power because her air conditioner is running.
scenes.intent: Zhang Qimin wants to understand the source of the shock. He seeks a reason to enter the apartment.
scenes.conflict: He must reconcile his engineering knowledge with the unexpected shock.
scenes.outcome: He discovers a potential reason to approach her (the working AC).

scenes.title: Zhang Qimin
scenes.action: Zhang Qimin shouts one last time, asking her to open the door because her AC is working. When he receives no response, he assumes she is sleeping and walks away toward the stairs.

location.name: Hallway outside Jiang Yan's door and the staircase

scenes.intent: Zhang Qrimin wants her to open the door. Jiang Yan wants to maintain her silence.
scenes.conflict: He is met with total silence and no response from the apartment.
scenes.state: Zhang Qimin is frustrated and defeated.
scenes.outcome: Zhang Qimin gives up and leaves the floor.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan mutes her monitor and pretends to be absent while listening to the hallway. She remains motionless to avoid detection. She waits for the noise to cease.

location.name: Apartment 3201
location.description: a quiet interior space with a monitor

scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to avoid interaction with the person outside. She seeks to maintain her cover of being asleep or unavailable. She wants to monitor the situation without being noticed.
scenes.conflict: Jiang Yan is being monitored by someone outside her door. The noise from the hallway threatens to reveal her presence.
scenes.state: Alert and cautious. She is performing a facade of being unconscious.
scenes.relation: Jiang Yan is hiding from Jiang Qimin
scenes.outcome: Jiang Qimin assumes she is in the bedroom and stops knocking.

scenes.title: Jiang Qimin
scenes.action: Jiang Qannis shouts a few times at the door and assumes Jiang Yan is in the bedroom. He decides not to knock again. He turns around with an irritated expression and walks toward the stairs.
scenes.intent: Jiang Qimin wants to wake or engage Jiang Yan. He attempts to communicate through the door. He eventually seeks to leave the area.
scenes.conflict: The lack of response from the apartment frustrates him. He cannot reach the person inside.
scenes.state: Irritated and frustrated. He feels ignored.
scenes.relation: Jiang Qimin is trying to interact with Jiang Yan
scenes.outcome: He turns away to walk toward the stairs.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei opens the door of apartment 3203 with a creak. She approaches Jiang Qimin with a wide smile and asks to borrow a charger. She attempts to engage him in conversation.
scenes.intent: He Chunmei wants to borrow a charging cable. She also wants to satisfy her curiosity about the neighbor. She seeks social interaction.
scenes.conflict: She is interrupted by the tension between the neighbors. Her curiosity leads to a confrontation.
scenes.state: Cheerful and inquisitive. She is eager to gossip.|Outlam: He Chunmei initiates a conversation with Jiang Qimin.
scenes.relation: He Chunmei is a neighbor attempting to gossip with Jiang Qimin
scenes.outcome: Jiang Qimin responds with mockery.

scenes.title: Jiang Qimin
scenes.action: Jiang Qimin turns to He Chunmei and mocks her for eavesdropping. He points out that she is an adult with children yet still spies on neighbors. He tells her she was too loud and that he heard everything.
scenes.intent: Jiang Qimin wants to shut down He Chunmei's curiosity. He intends to reprimand her for her behavior. He wants to end the conversation.
scenes.conflict: He Chunmei's intrusive questions and eavesdropping behavior. Her curiosity creates a social friction.
scenes.state: Mocking and dismissive. He is annoyed by her presence.
scenes.relation: Jiang Qimin is rebuking He Chunmei
scenes.outcome: He walks away without looking back.

scenes.title: He Chunmei
scenes.action: He Chunmei stands frozen with a strained smile after being rebuked. She mutters curses to herself as she returns to her apartment. She reflects on her failed plan to investigate the neighbor due to the heat and her children's illness.
scenes.intent: He Chunmei wants to process her embarrassment. She intends to return to her home. She contemplates the rumors circulating in the building.
scenes.conflict: The social rejection from Jiang Qimin. The physical hardship of the heat and her children's sickness.
scenes.state: Embarrassed and angry. She is internally cursing.
scenes.relation: He Chunmei is left alone after the confrontation
scenes.outcome: She returns to her apartment in silence.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan waits for Jiang Qimin to leave before turning on her phone. She sees a flood of notifications and news in the residents' chat. She notices a strange photo of the courtyard taken at dawn.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to check the status of the building. She seeks to understand the recent events. She investigates the contents of the chat.
scenes.conflict: The overwhelming amount of distressing news in the chat. The disturbing nature of the photo.
scenes.state: Attentive and increasingly shocked. She is transitioning from quiet observation to horror.
scenes.relation: Jiang Yan is observing the community's reaction
scenes.outcome: She discovers a horrifying image of dead bodies.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan zooms in on the photo and sees desiccated, disfigured human bodies in the courtyard. She notices large, blood-red mosquitoes feeding on a relatively fresh corpse. She feels intense disgust and claustrophobia.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to identify what is in the photo. She tries to process the visual horror. She struggles to comprehend the scene.
scenes.conflict: The gruesome sight of the decomposing bodies. The biological horror of the giant mosquitoes. The sensory memory of the smell.
scenes.state: Horrified and nauseated. She experiences a sense of physical revulsion.
scenes.relation: Jiang Yan is a witness to the carnage
scenes.outcome: She realizes the scale of the tragedy.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan analyzes the state of the bodies and concludes they died less than 24 hours before being thrown from windows. She notes the presence of bloodstains and the timing of blood clotting. She begins to wonder about the motive behind this massacre.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to deduce the timeline of the deaths. She seeks to understand the motive of the perpetrator. She attempts to make sense of the carnage.
scenes.conflict: The mystery of who committed the crime and why. The realization of the extreme violence.
scenes.state: Analytical yet terrified. She is gripped by a deep sense of dread.
scenes.relation: Jiang Yan is investigating the crime scene via photo
scenes.outcome: She enters a state of profound questioning.

scenes.title: Residents of the Complex
scenes.action: Various residents post angry and terrified messages in the group chat. They discuss the immorality of throwing bodies from heights and the difficulty of contacting the police. They report that the management company burned the bodies at the entrance.
scenes.intent: The residents want to vent their anger. They seek help from the police. They express fear for their own safety.
scenes.conflict: The breakdown of social morality. The inability to reach emergency services. The extreme heat and impending weather.
scenes.state: Angry, terrified, and desperate. They are experiencing a loss of humanity.
scenes.relation: The residents are reacting to the shared tragedy
scenes.outcome: The bodies are burned by the management company.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan puts down her phone with a heavy heart, reflecting on the loss of humanity. She receives a private message from Jiang Qimin. The message contains a video file and a claim about finding something in the surveillance room.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to process the news. She receives information from Jiang Qimin. She prepares to view the provided video.
scenes.conflict: The internal struggle with the worsening situation. The intrusion of Jiang Qimin's message.
scenes.state: Heavy-hearted and somber. She is burdened by the news.
scenes.relation: Jiang Qimin is contacting Jiang Yan privately
scenes.outcome: Jiang Yan opens the video.

scenes.title: Jiang Yan
scenes.action: Jiang Yan watches the video and sees herself exiting the elevator carrying a chainsaw. Jiang Qimin sends messages complimenting her appearance and joking about a soundtrack. He also informs her that he has secured a spot for her in the underground shelter.
scenes.intent: Jiang Yan wants to see the footage. Jiang Qimin wants to share the video and offer her a place in the shelter. He intends to be helpful/flirtatious.
scenes.conflict: The unsettling sight of her own violent-looking actions on camera. The intrusive and persistent nature of Jiang Qimin's messages.
scenes.state: Startled and uneasy. She is overwhelmed by his persistence.
props: Video of Jiang Yan with a chainsaw
scenes.relation: Jiang Qitimn is acting as a self-appointed protector/informant
scenes.outcome: Jiang Yan's suspicions about the situation are confirmed.

scenes.title: Djang Yanni
scenes.action: Djang Yanni receives a phone call from Djang Qimin informing her that he has added her to the list of residents moving to the underground shelter. He mentions he secured a private corner for her with limited food and water. She realizes the underground parking is being converted into a temporary refuge.

location.name: Djang Yanni's apartment
location.description: a place experiencing extreme heat of 70 degrees

scenes.intent: Djang Yanni wants to understand her living situation. She seeks to confirm her suspicions about the underground shelter. She aims to survive the rising temperatures.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat of 70 degrees makes staying in the apartment a death sentence. The underground conditions are uncomfortable and scarce.
scenes.state: Disturbed by the man's intrusiveness but relieved by the information.
scenes.relation: Djang Yanni feels intruded upon by Djang Qimin's persistence.
scenes.outcome: Djang Yanni confirms the underground parking is being repurposed and decides to prepare for the move.

scenes.title: Djang Qimin
scenes.action: Djang Qimin descends the stairs from the twenty-eighth floor toward the lower levels. As he turns from the stairs into the corridor, he spots a familiar figure in the distance. He recognizes her as the girl from Djang Qiqi's video recording.
scenes.intent: Djang Qimin is moving through the building. He intends to continue his descent.
scenes.conflict: None.
scenes.relation: He recognizes Djang Qiqi from previous encounters.
scenes.outcome: He slows his pace to look at her.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi stands in the corridor, looking different than before with short hair and a floral dress. She is sweating profusely due to the heat but maintains a graceful appearance. She notices Djang Qimin approaching.
scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi is simply present in the hallway. She notices the man approaching her.
scenes.conflict: The intense heat is causing her to sweat heavily.
scenes.state: Graceful yet physically strained by the heat.

outfits.Djang Qiqi: A light dress with a floral pattern, which is quite revealing.

scenes.relation: She recognizes him and responds with a slight smirk.
scenes.outcome: She acknowledges his presence with a comment.

scenes.title: Djang Qimin, Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: A piercing siren wails outside, causing both characters to tense up instantly. Djang Qiqi asks what is happening in surprise. Djang Qimin observes the surroundings and suggests a new evacuation has begun due to a potential cooling system failure in the shelter.
scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to know the cause of the alarm. Djang Qimin wants to assess the situation.
scenes.conflict: The sudden siren creates immediate tension and uncertainty.
scenes.state: Both characters are tense and surprised.
scenes.relation: They are momentarily united by the shared alarm.
scenes.outcome: They realize the situation is escalating.

scenes.title: Duju Residents
scenes.action: An announcement over the loudspeaker warns all residents to prepare for emergency evacuation due to rising temperatures and potential oxygen failure. Crowds of people begin rushing out of their apartments toward the emergency exits. Djang Qimin tells Djang Qiqi they must move immediately.
scenes.intent: The authorities want to evacuate the building. Djang Qimin wants to escape the heat quickly.
scenes.conflict: The rising temperature and oxygen failure threaten the lives of all residents. The crowd is panicking and pushing.
scenes.relation: Djang Qimin takes a leadership role in the moment.
scenes.outcome: Djang Qimin and Djang Qiqi begin to move toward the exit.

scenes.title: Djang Yanni
scenes.action: Djang Yanni is finishing her morning workout on the second floor when she hears the sirens. She quickly turns off her treadmill and runs to the window to observe the chaos. She realizes the situation is becoming much more serious.
scenes.intent: Djang Yanni wants to check the status of the outside world. She wants to monitor the unfolding crisis.
scenes.conflict: The sirens signal an escalating environmental disaster.
scenes.outcome: She realizes the severity of the heatwave and the evacuation.

scenes.title: Djang Yanni
scenes.action: Duju Yanni quickly changes her clothes and gathers her essential belongings. She prepares to leave her apartment to join the evacuation. She is preoccupied with thoughts of what will happen when there is no more place to retreat.
scenes.intent: Djang Yanni wants to prepare for the evacuation. She seeks to gather enough supplies to survive.
scenes.conflict: The lack of a safe retreat in the future.
scenes.state: Focused and anxious about the future.

outfits.Djang Yanni: Changed into clothes suitable for moving/evacuating.

scenes.outcome: She heads toward the exit to join the evacuation.

scenes.title: Djang Qimin
scenes.action: Djang Qimin reflects on the information he recently discovered about Djang Yanni. He recalls seeing footage of her surrounded by He Chunmei and her friends. He realizes she is a wealthy heiress with a thirty-billion fortune and a famous internet personality.
scenes.intent: Djang Qimin is processing new information about a person's identity. He is re-evaluating his knowledge of Djang Yanni.
scenes.conflict: The shock of discovering her true social status and wealth.
scenes.relation: His perception of Djang Yuju changes from a simple resident to a powerful heiress.
scenes.outcome: He realizes the person he thought was just a resident is actually a billionaire.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi, Djang Qimin
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi catches up to Djang Qimin and calls out to him with a charming smile. She reveals that she had been calling and messaging him without response. She explains she climbed from the 7th floor to the 28th floor specifically to find him.
scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to interact with Djang Qimin. She wants to show her effort in finding him.
scenes.conflict: She had been ignored by him previously.
scenes.state: Djang Qiqi is charming and energetic; Djang Qimin is composed.
scenes.relation: She is pursuing his attention; he is being somewhat distant.
scenes.outcome: They are reunited in the hallway during the chaos.

scenes.title: Djang Qimin
scenes.action: Djang Qimin speaks to Djang Qiqi with a tone of care mixed with light irony. He questions her endurance for climbing so many floors. Internally, he reveals he ignored her calls because he is prioritizing Djang Yanni after learning her true identity. He contemplates the potential for a relationship with the wealthy Djang Yanni, drawing parallels to a news story about a billionaire and a gardener.
scenes.intent: Djang Qimin wants to maintain a polite, slightly detached persona. He intends to pursue Djang Yanni for the potential benefits of her wealth and status.
scenes.conflict: His internal conflict between his current social interaction and his new strategic interest in Djang Yanni.
scenes.relation: He is intentionally distancing himself from Qiqi to focus on Yanni.
scenes.outcome: He feels optimistic about the potential for new romantic and social horizons through the crisis.

scenes.title: Djang Cimin
scenes.action: Djang Cimin reflects on his romantic potential with women like Djang Qiqi, imagining a future of new relationship horizons. He feels a sense of growing joy and optimism about his prospects. He smiles to himself while lost in these hopeful thoughts.

location.name: An unspecified upper floor or balcony

scenes.intent: He wants to envision a successful future in relationships. He seeks emotional satisfaction through daydreaming. He hopes to find stability through new connections.
scenes.conflict: He is currently facing a personal crisis and a changing world. The heat and social collapse threaten his stability.
scenes.outcome: He becomes visibly happy, which attracts attention.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi approaches Djang Cimin and asks why he is smiling so broadly. Djang Cimin reacts with embarrassment, scratching the back of his head. He then asks her why she has come up to see him.

location.name: An upper floor or balcony area

scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to confront him about his strange behavior. She wants to initiate a conversation. She intends to check on him.
scenes.conflict: Djang Cimin is embarrassed by her direct questioning. He is caught off guard by her presence.

outfits.Djang Qiqi: A slender figure, clothing not specified.

scenes.relation: Djang Qiqi is being playful/flirtatious; Djang Cimin is being defensive/embarrassed.
scenes.outcome: A conversation begins regarding her reason for visiting.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi reveals she came in person because he ignored her calls and messages. She smiles mischievously at his reaction. Djang Cimin looks at her body, and his voice becomes low and husky.

location.name: An upper floor or balcony area

scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to tease him about his lack of responsiveness. She wants to assert her presence. She aims to flirt.
scenes.conflict: Djang Cimin's previous avoidance of her communication creates a minor tension. The intense heat in the air adds physical tension.
scenes.relation: The tension between them becomes more sexual/intimate.
scenes.outcome: The atmosphere becomes heavy with heat and attraction.

scenes.title: Djang Cimin
scenes.action: Djang Cimin suggests that Djang Qiqi should come inside to drink water because she must be tired from the climb. He informs her that he already has the records and information she requested. He speaks directly and plainly.

location.name: Near the entrance of his living space

scenes.intent: Djang Cimin wants to invite her into his space. He wants to provide her with relief from the heat. He wants to show he is useful by providing information.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat makes physical movement difficult. The social collapse makes such direct offers loaded with subtext.
scenes.relation: Djang Cimin is taking a lead in the interaction.
scenes.outcome: Djang Qiqi understands the underlying sexual subtext of his invitation.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qqi considers the changing world where moral norms are collapsing due to the heat and resource scarcity. She realizes that while she wouldn't normally be interested in Djang Cimin, his influence and resources are now vital for her survival as a single mother. She decides not to enter his home yet.
scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to maintain her independence while calculating her survival needs. She intends to decline the immediate invitation to keep her leverage. She seeks to protect her son.
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and the end of the world create a desperate need for resources. Her personal morals clash with her survival instincts.
scenes.outcome: She declines his offer to come inside.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi mentions the upcoming relocation to the underground parking and the need to get food rations. Her expression of grievance causes Djang Cimin's heart to race. He enthusiastically promises to help her and her son.

location.name: Near the entrance of Djang Cimin's living space

scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to express her hardship. Djang Cimin wants to prove his worth to her. He aims to secure her affection by offering protection.
scenes.conflict: The looming threat of relocation and food scarcity. Djang Cimin's emotional instability caused by her grievance.
scenes.state: Djang Qiqi is aggrieved; Djang Cimin is excited and eager.
scenes.relation: Djang Cimin becomes more devoted to her.
scenes.outcome: Djang Qiqi agrees to visit him for a glass of water.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi leaves the area and begins a slow, difficult descent down the stairs. She leans on the railing because her legs are shaking from her racing heartbeat and the intense heat. She moves in a trance-like state until she reaches her apartment on the seventh floor.
scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to reach her home safely. She aims to recover from the physical strain of the heat. She seeks rest.
scenes.conflict: The extreme temperature threatens her health. Her physical weakness makes the descent dangerous.
scenes.outcome: She reaches her apartment.

scenes.title: Djang Qixi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi receives a scheduled message from Djang Cimin on her phone. The message reveals that the owner of apartment 3201 is Jiang Yan, the wealthy daughter of a missing woman and a billionaire heiress. Djang Cimin warns her to keep this information secret and promises a reward.
scenes.intent: Djang Cimin wants to provide her with valuable intelligence. He wants to build a bond through shared secrets. He aims to reward her later.
scenes.conflict: The weight of the secret information. The danger of the information being leaked.
scenes.state: Djang Qiqi is shocked and stunned.
scenes.relation: Djang Cimin acts as an informant/ally.
scenes.outcome: Djang Qiqi realizes the true identity of her rival.

scenes.title: Djang Qiqi
scenes.action: Djang Qiqi realizes that Jiang Yan is the daughter of Li Meizheng and understands why she was humiliated the previous day. She leans against her door, breathing deeply and clenching her fists. She feels a surge of hatred toward Jiang Yan, her son's father's death, and her deceased father.
scenes.intent: Djang Qiqi wants to process her intense emotions. She seeks to find a way to handle her enemies. She aims to vent her internal rage.
